at least two lagna and normally he will be running a raja
yoga period.For example advani has tenth lord in neecha in
12th house. One has to question the horoscope instead of
gulping it as what written in the magazines.
What are the principles in predictions-
1. Take the horoscope of the political leaders contesting
the elections
2. Mark the lagna, Chandra lagna and karkamsha lagna and
compare. Who ever are stronger will win.
3. Mark the antra and compare.who ever stronger will win.
4. Finally see the transit principle of Saturn this will
help you to decide who will win the elections.
5. You can use the coronation time of the person to the
office or the coronation time of the government.
6. at times you can also use the time in which election are
announced.
7. Time when the person files his nominations.
8. Time at which the party unveils its manifesto.

All these timing will work. Do not take too many criterias
for analysis purpose.
